en: In the sea there is a fish, a fish that has a secret wish
ko: 바다에 물고기가 있어, 비밀스러운 소원을 가진 물고기

en: A wish to be a big cactus with a pink flower on it
ko: 큰 선인장이 되고 싶어, 분홍색 꽃이 있는

en: And in the sea there is a fish, a fish that has a secret wish
ko: 그리고 바다에 물고기가 있어, 비밀스러운 소원을 가진 물고기

en: A wish to be a big cactus with a pink flower on it
ko: 큰 선인장이 되고 싶어, 분홍색 꽃이 있는

en: Hey, did you put like a hundred things of Tic Tacs in my mailbox?
ko: 야, 내 우편함에 틱택 백 개 넣었어?

en: Oh, yeah. Yeah, that was me. Why?
ko: 아, 맞아. 그거 내가 했어. 왜?

en: Well, you know, they're your fave.
And, I mean, you can never have too many of your favourite one-calorie breath mints, so I just thought I'd...
ko: 그리고, 너는 좋아하는 칼로리 제로 입냄새 제거제를 너무 많이 가질 수는 없으니까, 그냥 생각했어...

en: Yeah, well, thanks. I think I'm pretty much set until college on the Tic Tac.
ko: 응, 고마워. 이제 대학 가기 전까지 틱택은 충분해.

en: You know, Blake, I was thinking...
And I'm sorry I was such a huge bitch to you. You don't deserve it.
ko: 그리고 내가 너한테 정말 나쁜 년처럼 굴어서 미안해. 너는 그럴 자격이 없어.

en: It's okay, you know. It's okay.
I think I'm in love with you.
You think you can be his friends?
ko: 너 그와 친구가 될 수 있을 것 같아?

en: Because you're, like, the coolest person in the world.
